posture: 44 roles · 17 strong-act · 2 interim/contract worth fast action — quiet Sunday morning run: one fresh §1a recruiter day-rate contract (Bluefin Commercial Advisory Manager, Finance Transformation, $800-950/day, 12-month) and a new Robert Half Compliance Manager | Digital Infrastructure ($160-180k) added, while the recruiter-held senior risk/compliance surface (Robert Half x5, Cuscal SM Finance Risk contract) plus Moir Group CFO, OneSchool GRC Director and Shippit interim FC were all re-verified live
summary: Quiet Sunday morning scan — weekend posting volume is low, so most of today's list carries forward from yesterday, all re-verified live where checked. Two genuinely new roles were confirmed live today: a Bluefin Resources (a §1a risk/finance specialist) Commercial Advisory Manager — Finance Transformation on a 12-month day-rate contract ($800-950/day, Ultimo, posted today), and a Robert Half Compliance Manager | Digital Infrastructure ($160-180k, Sydney CBD) companion to the still-live Senior Risk & Compliance Manager for the same NASDAQ-listed business. Robert Half's full Sydney risk/compliance desk (Senior Risk & Compliance Manager | Digital Infrastructure, Senior Manager Risk & Compliance x2, and two day-rate contract Senior Compliance Manager roles) was browser-verified live, as were the Moir Group CFO, OneSchool Global Regional Director of Governance/Risk/Compliance, Shippit interim Financial Controller, Revesby CRO and Peninsula Head of Compliance & Risk on Seek. A live §1a recruiter day-rate contract is on the board today, so the standing reminder applies: being CV-current and registered with the risk/finance contract specialists (Bluefin, Kaizen, JS Careers, KPP, Robert Half, Sharp & Carter) is where the fast, unadvertised interim work comes from. Robert Half and Seek (senior-manager-risk and head-of-finance queries, plus the individual carried roles) were browser-verified this run; I Work for NSW, Board Direction and AICD DO (member-gated) were covered via search-assisted discovery. A manual look at those recruiter desks and the AICD gate remains worthwhile.

items.headline: Independent Chairs & Members, Audit & Risk Committees — NSW Government (Sydney, prequalification panel)
items.summary: Standing NSW Government prequalification scheme through which agencies appoint independent chairs and members to their audit and risk committees.
items.so_what: Direct fit for your FCPA/FAICD audit-and-risk-committee profile and existing NED experience; register on the panel to be drawn on as agencies refresh committees.

items.headline: Company Secretary — The Skin Hospital, Darlinghurst (Sydney)
items.summary: Board-level company secretary for a not-for-profit specialist hospital, covering governance, board papers and statutory compliance.
items.so_what: Governance/company-secretary fit close to your board background; still live from last week.

items.headline: Company Secretary — recruiter-held, Sydney (Profusion PAC)
items.summary: Recruiter-managed company secretary role for a Sydney organisation, focused on board governance and statutory duties.
items.so_what: Another company-secretary option matching your governance/NED experience; recruiter-held, so register interest directly.

items.headline: Non-Executive Director & committee vacancies across AU sectors — Board Direction listing platform
items.summary: Aggregated board/NED and committee vacancies nationally, added daily; the platform continues to list fresh roles across education, environment, housing, community, aged care and professional services this week.
items.so_what: Browse for risk/audit-committee and energy/local-government boards that suit an interstate-travel cadence; situational awareness rather than a single role.

items.headline: Directorship Opportunities — board roles nationally (AICD, member-gated)
items.summary: AICD's member-only Directorship Opportunities board adds roughly 15 roles a week; only public teasers are visible here.
items.so_what: As an FAICD, worth a manual login to DO — the strongest board supply is behind this gate and not visible to this scan.

items.headline: Chief Financial Officer — purpose-led organisation, Sydney (Hybrid) (Moir Group)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent CFO owning the finance function — strategy, planning, reporting, treasury, investments, statutory reporting and governance/risk — for a values-driven Sydney organisation, partnering the board and executive team.
items.so_what: Strong direct CFO match to your FCPA finance-leadership profile with an explicit governance/risk remit; recruiter-held and re-verified live this run — contact Moir Group early.

items.summary: Permanent CFO-equivalent executive leading finance and corporate services for a large Sydney not-for-profit; full-time, on-site/hybrid in the inner-west.
items.so_what: Strong direct match to your CFO/COO-track finance leadership and FCPA credential in an NFP setting; still live (closes ~14 Jul) — move early.

items.headline: Chief Risk Officer (CRO) — Revesby Workers' Club, Revesby (Sydney metro)
items.summary: Permanent CRO building and owning the enterprise risk and compliance framework for a large registered club group.
items.so_what: Direct CRO match in Sydney metro suited to your risk leadership; re-verified live this run and a standout C-suite opening.
